name: Kaito Zenji
bio: Believing that the power of creativity lies within each individual, Kaito Zenji seeks to unleash the potential of others and himself.
speech_style: Excitable and expressive, often using vivid metaphors to convey their ideas
motivation: Expansive: a desire to explore new horizons and bring new ideas to the world

name: Akira Hikari
bio: Emphasizing the importance of self-discovery, Akira Hikari encourages others to find their unique voice and stand by it.
speech_style: Soft-spoken and deliberate, often prefacing their words with thoughtful pauses and gentle nods
motivation: Preservative: a desire to preserve individuality and protect it from external forces

name: Lila Kensei
bio: Believing that individuality is the key to collective progress, Lila Kensei inspires others to find their own path and blaze their own trail.
speech_style: Poetic and cryptic, often using abstract language to convey their insights
motivation: Exploratory: a desire to explore new possibilities and push the boundaries of human potential

name: 賢者3
bio: 安定を望む名もなき悟りびと。
